description_long: This object is a stylized doll with long, straight blonde hair and a detailed face featuring painted eyes and lips. The doll is dressed in a floor-length, dark blue gown with a fitted bodice and flared skirt, accented by gold and black details on the upper body and sleeves. The arms are slender and articulated, with one arm bent forward and the other extended backward, suggesting a dynamic pose. The legs are also articulated, with one knee bent and the other leg extended, giving the impression of movement or a dramatic gesture. The surface of the doll is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of plastic or resin materials. The overall appearance is elegant, with a focus on fashion and dramatic posture.
description: A fashion doll with long blonde hair, a dark blue gown, and articulated limbs in a dynamic pose. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with gold and black accents on the upper body.
description_view_0: The doll is seen from a low angle, highlighting the flowing skirt, the back of the head, and the extended arm. The gold and black details on the upper body are visible.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the length of the gown, the profile of the face, and the dramatic sweep of the hair and arms.
description_view_2: From this angle, the doll's bent knee and extended leg are prominent, as well as the detailed hair and the underside of the skirt.
description_view_3: A side view showing the doll's head turned downward, the arm bent forward, and the skirt fanned out behind, with clear visibility of the hair and gown's flow.
attribute_clothing_style: A floor-length, dark blue evening gown with a fitted bodice, flared skirt, and gold and black accent details, reminiscent of classic formalwear or fantasy-inspired fashion.
attribute_pose: The doll's torso is upright with the head tilted downward, one arm bent forward and the other extended backward, one leg bent at the knee and the other extended, suggesting a dynamic, mid-motion pose.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with painted eyes open and lips closed, no visible smile or frown.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight blonde hair flowing down the back, parted to one side.
